name: Nationwide Beverage Bottling Corp.
summary: Nationwide Beverage Bottling Corp., through its subsidiary, Nationwide Beverage Bottling, Inc., operates a bottling facility in Corona, California. It engages in the sale of bottled drinking water to national chains; private label water bottles for corporations and schools; and co-packaging of bottled water for other companies. The company produces and markets Agua Sabores, a fructose-sweetened and fruit flavored-water product; Palomar Mountain Spring Water; and KoKomo Mountain Spring Water flavored beverages. It sells its products to supermarket stores. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Corona, California.
